steps.assistant_text: Linear-search leaf over 0x60-stride records (find by word-0 key). 3 levers: (1) goto-to-shared-return-0 tail defeats the -O2 loop unroller (every if(count>0) guard spelling triggered 4x unroll) while producing blezl-to-shared-jr with move v0,zero dup in the annulled delay; (2) decl order i before count -> i=$v0 (counter doubles as return reg), count=$v1; (3) dead empty if(a1){} before the guard (emission-free compute_save priority boost) keeps key in $a1, cursor colors $a2, kills the spurious move a2,a1.
